title: Market research briefing deck
description: Create a research-heavy briefing deck with evidence and cross-validation.

question.query: Build a concise 8-10 slide market briefing on the current AI coding tools market for a product strategy meeting. Include market map, customer segments, competitive positions, evidence-backed risks, and recommended next moves. Cite sources in speaker notes.
question.query_chinese: 为一次产品战略会议制作一份简洁的 8-10 页市场简报 PPT，主题是当前 AI 编程工具市场。包括市场地图、客户细分、竞争定位、有证据支撑的风险，以及建议的下一步行动。请在演讲备注中引用来源。
